case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,583.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR MAY-22-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, REINSTATE AND EXONERATE BAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 501, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF MAY-22-1998, DENIED MOTION & SANCTIONS.
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JUN-22-1999 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 301, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF JUN-22-1999, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PER NON-OPPOSITION.
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND BOND IS EXONERATED
